title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Doflamingo Family, Rebecca, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #2 as luffy’s Colosseum path becomes personal when Don Chinjao recognizes his connection to Garp and attacks him with old resentment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Someone else I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ohhohh Ohio ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn! It's not even a ship anymore

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is... this is "beauty"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Indeed. With this, the straw- hat crew ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Has lost all hope of escaping from Dressrosa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: OHHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOHOOHO!! DID YOU THINK YOUR DISTRACTIONS WOULD FOOL ME?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: OHHOH HOW HOHO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: OHHOH HOW HOW HOWO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Dress- Rosa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Corrida Colos- Seum

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If it's a matter of medical treatment, forget it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I will leave as I am....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fighter Ricky....!! We couldn't possibly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The guests, in particular, will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well, it's our job to at least apply first aid to your wounds

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You speak of first aid after holding a death match before a crowd!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The blood flowing from your head isn't stopping... Please take off that mask so I can treat you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't lay a hand on my mask!! Show me to the exit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Subdue him! He's badly wounded!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Clink!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Someone I'll be nearly

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What terrible wounds ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You should really have them looked at...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...!! out of my way !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can walk on my own ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Head inside... and take the stairs to the basement

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Someone else I'll

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: Rebecca ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm sorry ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Inside the Colosseum: Donquixote Family Stand- By Room

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Strawhat is... Currently participating in the tournament, Diamante

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait until. After this match is over

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Joker WANTS ME TO KILL STRAMWHAT ...?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: DOFFY IS TOO SOFT... EVEN AFTER YOU WENT AND LOST THE TOURNAMENT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He's giving you another chance... It's your lucky day, Bellamy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Assassination is easy work

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, Bellamy!!! Hang in there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's try to have this all taken care of before the tournament ends

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And with all that cleared up...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: You'll be an "Officer" in the family....!!

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
